_comment: Starter template for Skill 35 weekly-batch.sh. Copy to ~/.openclaw/config/content-calendar.json and edit. Dates are YYYY-MM-DD in the box's local timezone. 'platforms' values match run-publishing-cycle.sh --platforms (linkedin, medium, x, wordpress, substack, ghl, youtube, facebook, instagram, tiktok, threads, pinterest, email, podcast). 'schedule' is one of: 'auto' (cadence-driven, default), 'now' (publish immediately), or an ISO 8601 timestamp like '2026-05-26T14:00:00Z'.
